form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fifth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Best figures puts her right in this and well worth another chance.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by a nose in 20.17, beating Sunnybrook. Last start finished 5th on April 11 over 340m at this track behind Maybe Yes beaten 6 lengths (19.97) in a Grade 5. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at the last two runs, both at Dubbo, the latest when beaten 19 lengths behind Pink Milk over 318m. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 4.5 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Better than last run and looks an each way chance.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 340m in 19.84. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 340m at this track at Grade 5 level. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (20.01) over 340m at this track. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.
